knownLimitations: npm/node-gyp dependency chain is blocked by libnode-dev and libssl-dev
g++ dependency chain is blocked by lne/lnd gcc package line mismatch
do not run real apt full-upgrade without a recoverable system image
recommendedDefaults: Use Node 14 CommonJS runtime for loong-agent
Keep command execution read-only unless explicitly confirmed
Use DeepSeek or another OpenAI-compatible remote model
Avoid direct upstream pi build on this board until Node/npm/g++ are resolved
